name: Control N - CN Technologies Private Limited
address: Sippi Opticals, 0, Katcheri St, opposite Udumalaipettai, Udumalaipettai, Tamil Nadu 642126, India

googleReviews.text:
We had a great experience working with Control N CN Technology Private Limited on our Bright Home Domestic Cleaning website.

Hari and his team were very friendly, approachable, and professional throughout the whole process. They understood our requirements clearly and delivered a high-quality website that reflects our business well.

What stood out most was their attention to detail and willingness to go the extra mile by suggesting improvements and adding features we hadn’t initially considered.

Overall, a very smooth and positive experience. I would highly recommend Hari and his team to anyone looking for reliable and professional web development services.

Excellent service and support throughout. Would definitely recommend. Despite multiple iterations, the team handled every change with professionalism and attention to detail. Their responsiveness and willingness to accommodate feedback really stood out. The final result turned out exactly as we envisioned - clean, refined, and premium. Very happy with their work!

Really I am so thankful to this Team. No words to say. Yes Mr.Hatihara Sudhan created wonderful profile for my handwriting academy. Output was so awesome me and my daughter were so happy seeing the profile,poster, and reels. Thank you very much dear. God bless you.

The Control N team is extremely service-oriented. Whenever we contact them, they promptly handle updates and support requests. As we belong to the education sector, our website plays a crucial role in institutional branding, and thanks to Control N, our website is vibrant, dynamic, and well-maintained. I sincerely thank Mr. Hari and his team for their excellent and dedicated service. Best wishes.

Congratulations and Best Wishes to Mr Hari and his team for their excellent services. They take up the inputs from clients point of view and always ensure timely delivery of expected content. My appreciations for their professional attitude as well as friendly support. I would recommend them as one of the best option for any organisation’s online branding services. Wishing them Good Luck 💐👏🏻

name: Elite AVM Sweets & Cakes
address: 108, Palani - Pollachi Rd, Udumalaipettai, Tamil Nadu 642126, India

googleReviews.text: Tea and coffee comes without hot. Pepper used for toppings in French fries. In AC hall, there is no service at all. Need to call everytime. Not a place to be recommended. Even the plate itself seems to be not washing.

Today visited AVM BAKES udumalpet and serving and customer response is very bad. Ordered tea and serverd  after 20mins and tea was already chill. Poor service and response from the server and bill counter is also adamant.  Recommended people to stop visiting udumalept AVM

Very poor service. Even though there are more than four staff members in the sales section, there is a serious lack of attention in handling even two customers. Initially, they said that the billing machine was not working, but after we insisted on getting the bill, it started working within two minutes. Items that were not requested were added to the bill. Later, they reduced them manually, but even then there were mistakes in the total.Only after asking for a proper bill did I come to know the actual amount I had to pay. If I had believed that the billing machine was not working, I might have ended up paying for items that I did not purchase.I would not recommend this shop for any purchases

They are providing a good customer service and they have variety of snacks items like Shawarma cakes,puffs,sweet items,beverages ,Fast food,fresh juice ,tea and badam drinks.

The bakery is spacious and they do have a affordable party hall for meeting,function and birthday party.

You can get the quality products in reasonable price.The bakery is located at Udumalpet to Pollachi Main road.

Best place to spend some time with friends to relax and chit chat in town.
This place offers very great varieties of cakes, biscuits, savouries , Sweets and chat items.  But some foods are not well cooked . Last time I got burger which was already spoiled(fungus formed ).

name: Sai Speech and Hearing Aid centre
address: Annamalai Complex, 130D/1, Palani Rd, Udumalaipettai, Tamil Nadu 642126, India

googleReviews.text: Got very good support from Mr.Karthik for my grand pa hearing kit. Getting good after sale support as well. Highly recommending SSHAC who are facing hearing issues..

Nice experience. I am from Bangalore and my mother is in Palani. Called him to service my mother's Siemens device.
After service works like a new one.
My mother is so happy. (Earlier tried twice in Bangalore)
Best , economical and good result.
Polite and knowledgeable person.

I ve been using aid for 20 years now, my previous aid machine was from  Chennai and coimbatore in big aid outlets..... Now last two years i am using machine from Sai and i  see Sai is the best among i had come across in terms of quality service and price.... good luck and thank you
Good service nice quality and friendly and experience staffs sai speech hearing aid center
Good service and caring clinic supper testing

googleReviews.text: It was one of the best institutions. This college helped me develop my skills and abilities. The staff also help and support students in developing their knowledge and skills in a meaningful way. I’m always grateful to this college.

Good educational institute for women, showing good results in placements and following their rules in strict.
Location - opposite to GVG auditorium on palani road.

Good place to today I went for jobfair.
College enjoyable moment and place in  life but I lost college Life.

Safety for Women's. All students who is going here will get a Feeling all of them as Thier own Sister. It is a good place to what Brother and Sister relationship. Staffs are teaching a Good Management skills to the students. All are very friendly. A good teacher's can a make  College into a best to comparing to all.

Good atmosphere and ambience.
Library is well organized. Expertise faculties. Only odd thing here is canteen . The atmosphere of canteen is completely untidy and snack items are not hygienic and especially a very small cup of tea is charged for ₹15..even a good bakery gets the same amount but there they provide in larger glass tumbler with good taste .

name: Arulmigu Mariamman Temple
description: The dazzling wealth, the magnificence of the return, the return of the ancient glory of Vidyagal, the great glory of Tirupur, and the great glory of Tirupur, The famous earth. Urumalaipettai town center in the center of the city is a large lake, water resources, land, seerwalam, kalavalavam, there is no shortage of diseases, remedies and diseases, the desire of the mother, the strength of the mother, the strength of many On the first Tuesday of the year Panguni Waxing is celebrated with the fasting, the day of the Mahotsav Festival, which begins with the flag burning, flower, mavilakku, sprouting, Tirukkayyana, Therottam, Parivetti, Yellow water! 72 villages merged! Madarasi, Majesty, Mariammayam Mariammani, we live in good health.

googleReviews.text: This is a temple festival held Udumalpet every year. This year I got an opportunity to visit this temple. Devotees offer free food, water and curd water to other devotees. Surrounded village people gathers and celebrate together. Mariamman car festival starts 6.00 pm the God visit important streets and comes to temple by evening 9.30pm. It's a different experience..

Mariamman temple:

Powerful godess Mariamman cure eye diseases . Popularly known as Udumalai Mariamman temple.

Popular for its car ( chariot ) festival, usually celebrated on April month or Tamil Manthiri chithirai.

Festival celebrated for 15 days .
Begin with the announcement of festival ie.,Nonbu saattuthal on one Tuesday .
Next tuesday ceremony of Kambam naduthal .
15 th day ( next Tuesday) Thiru kalyanam of Amman.
17 th day ( Thursday) car festival .
Next day ( Friday) night  vaana vedikkai ..

Very vibrant temple.

Great Ambience and Highly positive Vibrational Temple !
Best Temple in Udumalpet !
Its my hometown so always the mariamman temple Divine and peace
Small well maintained temple. Believe to be more powerful.

name: Raagam's Palate
address: 186/2, Palani Rd, Gandhi Nagar, Udumalaipettai, Tamil Nadu 642154, India

googleReviews.text:
Raagam's palate is located in Palani Road near Iswarya Nagar. It has different varieties like pizza, burger, ice cream cakes and fries, and snacks like cookies sweets.

Cutlets, garlic potato chips are really good. Banana milkshake was delicious. Veg Puffs was also good.
Snacks costs are little expensive.
UPI payment is available but no card payment

A good bakery in town. Potential to change a nice coffee shop. Atmosphere looks more like a bakery with little lack of story . The above is a suggestion for future . They are doing a good job and best in town

If you want to try different varieties like pizza, burger, ice cream cakes and fries, there is no other option than this shop in the town.

Chicken cutlets, garlic potato chips are really good. Banana milkshake was delicious.

All the snacks costs high. Even a egg puff cost Rs.30
Cakes are not upto mark.

I had a worst tea here, it's like hot water.
so pls avoid  tea/coffee.

This cakes and bakery shop was recommended by one of our local friend in udumalaipet. I saw the reviews, it was not that much good they were telling in reviews. But actually, this place is one of the best bakery and cakes shop. We ordered Falooda, Gigardhanda and snacks like puffs. We also drank cold badam milk and cold chocolate milk. I have also added the pictures of menu card so you can have a look at it. Because they provide more number of varieties of menus here. I don't think so the cold badam milk and chocolate milk is worth for the money. But even then it tastes good. Everything we ate here had a very good taste. The place was also maintained good. Falooda was a masterpiece. It tastes very good. We have also bought some homemade chocolates here. Chocolates was also tastes good. The only negative I saw was, they have added peanuts in homemade chocolates for cashew nuts. If they had added cashew nuts, it would have tastes much better.  But in Overall experience, it was a great shop.

Strictly No Visit

This is on of the worst bakeries in Udumalpet lots of varieties of cakes, biscuits, savories, juices and all old quality snacks are available. The price are sky rocket juices which are more watery in nature will cost you 100.
Don't Visit
